_comment: Bad case 03 — REQUEST_TAXI without a position phrase ('at parking', 'on the apron'). Engine prepends a 'say position' remark via the position_remark variable but still clears the taxi. Part B verifies that providing the position keeps the flow clean. Replaces the originally planned REQUEST_FLIGHT_FOLLOWING-on-TOWER scenario, which uncovered an engine gap (no intent_frequency enforcement in atc_state_machine) deferred to M6.
name: Bad case 03 — taxi without position remark (LSZG EU)

say.note: Part A — pilot omits position; controller adds 'say position' remark and still clears
say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo request taxi

say.note: Part B — readback so we can re-issue from a clean state
say.text: Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo holding point runway 06

say.note: Recovery — full ground-tower-departure flow continues normally
say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo holding short ready for departure
